ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "newspaper_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the newspaper where the article was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of publication */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of publication */,
  "article_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of article */,
  "text" TEXT /* Full text of the article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the article */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the article */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the article was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* When the article was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_newspaper_id FOREIGN KEY ("newspaper_id") REFERENCES newspapers ("newspaper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_article_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_type_id") REFERENCES article_types ("article_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "newspapers" (
  "newspaper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each newspaper */,
  "newspaper_title" TEXT /* Title of the newspaper */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of publication */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province of publication */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of publication */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date the newspaper was founded */,
  "circulation" INTEGER /* Circulation of the newspaper */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the newspaper */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("newspaper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_types" (
  "article_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the article type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the article type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* When the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "article_id" TEXT /* ID of the article being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the article */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_mode" TEXT /* Mode of access (e.g., online, offline) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "article_id" TEXT /* ID of the article the keyword belongs to */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword associated with the article */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the keyword was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* When the keyword was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_keywords_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* When the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_category_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "article_id" TEXT /* ID of the article */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* When the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_category_map_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_category_map_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES article_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "article_id" TEXT /* ID of the article */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the article */,
  "text" TEXT /* Full text of the article in this version */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the version was updated */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who updated the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* When the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_versions_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "article_id" TEXT /* ID of the article the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* When the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_comments_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "article_id" TEXT /* ID of the article the rating belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating value (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* When the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_ratings_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "article_id" TEXT /* ID of the article the tag belongs to */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* When the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_tags_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "article_id" TEXT /* ID of the article the topic belongs to */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the topic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* When the topic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_topics_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* When the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* When the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
